name: Ocean Breeze
description: A calm, refreshing palette inspired by coastal landscapes. Cool blues, soft teals, and sandy neutrals create a serene, approachable interface that feels natural and open.
author: System

referenceTokens.--surface-hierarchy: light sky blue base, white cards; deep navy in dark
referenceTokens.--intended-usage: Travel, wellness, productivity, personal blogs, portfolio sites
referenceTokens.--text-approach: Slate tones for text, blue accents for links, warm orange for CTAs
